security.csp: default-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' ipc: http://ipc.localhost asset: https://asset.localhost blob: data:; img-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost http://asset.localhost blob: data:; media-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost http://asset.localhost blob: data:; connect-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost http://asset.localhost ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://www.gstatic.com blob: data:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://www.gstatic.com blob:; worker-src 'self' blob:;

bundle.shortDescription: A lightweight 3D model viewer, available for macOS.
bundle.longDescription: Trivor (极视) is a lightweight 3D model viewer for macOS. Open glTF and GLB files, inspect geometry and materials, and orbit/zoom with a polished viewer.
